case.title: STANDARD WHOLESALE PHOSPHATE & ACID WORKS v. GENERAL

opinion.h4: STANDARD WHOLESALE PHOSPHATE & ACID WORKS v. GENERAL, (1935)
opinion.h2: STANDARD WHOLESALE PHOSPHATE AND ACID WORKS, Inc., petitioner, v. The GENERAL CHEMICAL COMPANY.* No. 264.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Messrs. Clair W. Fairbank and William R. Perkins, both of New York City, for petitioner.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit denied.
* Rehearing denied 296 U.S. 663, 56 S. Ct. 177.[ Standard Wholesale Phosphate & Acid Works v. General (1935) ]
